testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.resolve() returns local baseUrl and isOffline=true when both core files are cached
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.resolve() returns local baseUrl and isOffline=true when both core files are cached

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.resolve() falls back to CDN when loader.js is not cached
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.resolve() falls back to CDN when loader.js is not cached

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.resolve() falls back to CDN when editor.main.js is not cached
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.resolve() falls back to CDN when editor.main.js is not cached

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.resolve() falls back to CDN when getInfoAsync throws
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.resolve() falls back to CDN when getInfoAsync throws

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.isOfflineAvailable() returns true when all core files exist
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.isOfflineAvailable() returns true when all core files exist

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.isOfflineAvailable() returns false when any core file is missing
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.isOfflineAvailable() returns false when any core file is missing

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.isOfflineAvailable() returns false when getInfoAsync throws
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.isOfflineAvailable() returns false when getInfoAsync throws

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.downloadForOffline() creates directories and downloads each core file
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.downloadForOffline() creates directories and downloads each core file

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.downloadForOffline() calls onProgress with 0–100 values
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.downloadForOffline() calls onProgress with 0–100 values

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.downloadForOffline() works without an onProgress callback
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.downloadForOffline() works without an onProgress callback

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.clearCache() calls deleteAsync on the monaco base directory
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.clearCache() calls deleteAsync on the monaco base directory

testcase.classname: MonacoAssetManager.cacheDir returns a string containing the monaco version
testcase.name: MonacoAssetManager.cacheDir returns a string containing the monaco version

testcase.classname: buildMonacoHtml() returns a non-empty HTML string

testcase.classname: buildMonacoHtml() contains HTML5 doctype and body tags

testcase.classname: buildMonacoHtml() embeds the vsBaseUrl in the loader script src
testcase.name: buildMonacoHtml() embeds the vsBaseUrl in the loader script src

testcase.classname: buildMonacoHtml() embeds a local file:// URL correctly
testcase.name: buildMonacoHtml() embeds a local file:// URL correctly

testcase.classname: buildSandboxHtml embeds the extension id in the HTML
testcase.name: buildSandboxHtml embeds the extension id in the HTML

testcase.classname: buildSandboxHtml wraps extension source in a try/catch
testcase.name: buildSandboxHtml wraps extension source in a try/catch

testcase.name: buildSandboxHtml properly escapes extension id containing quotes

testcase.name: ExtensionRegistry registers and retrieves an extension

testcase.classname: ExtensionRegistry lists all registered extensions
testcase.name: ExtensionRegistry lists all registered extensions

testcase.classname: ExtensionRegistry unregisters an extension
testcase.name: ExtensionRegistry unregisters an extension

testcase.classname: ExtensionRegistry returns undefined for unknown extension id
testcase.name: ExtensionRegistry returns undefined for unknown extension id

testcase.classname: ExtensionRegistry dispatches messages to subscribed handlers
testcase.name: ExtensionRegistry dispatches messages to subscribed handlers

testcase.classname: ExtensionRegistry does not call handler after unsubscribe
testcase.name: ExtensionRegistry does not call handler after unsubscribe

testcase.classname: ExtensionRegistry supports multiple handlers
testcase.name: ExtensionRegistry supports multiple handlers

testcase.classname: activateExtension registers the extension and returns sandbox HTML
testcase.name: activateExtension registers the extension and returns sandbox HTML

testcase.classname: deactivateExtension removes the extension from the registry
testcase.name: deactivateExtension removes the extension from the registry

testcase.name: EXAMPLE_EXTENSION has required manifest fields

testcase.classname: EXAMPLE_EXTENSION produces valid sandbox HTML

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory returns sorted entries (dirs first, then files)
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory returns sorted entries (dirs first, then files)

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory returns empty array when directory does not exist
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory returns empty array when directory does not exist

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory returns empty array when path is a file, not a directory
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory returns empty array when path is a file, not a directory

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory normalizes paths that already end with /
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory normalizes paths that already end with /

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory appends missing trailing slash before calling getInfoAsync
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.listDirectory appends missing trailing slash before calling getInfoAsync

testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.writeFile writes content with UTF-8 encoding

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.writeFile propagates write errors
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.writeFile propagates write errors

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.createFile creates file with empty string by default
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.createFile creates file with empty string by default

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.createFile creates file with provided initial content
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.createFile creates file with provided initial content

testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.exists returns true when file exists

testcase.classname: FileSystemBridge.exists returns false when file does not exist
testcase.name: FileSystemBridge.exists returns false when file does not exist

testcase.classname: FileExplorer — file selection does not call onFileSelect when a directory is tapped

testcase.classname: FileExplorer — expand/collapse expands a directory and shows children on tap
testcase.name: FileExplorer — expand/collapse expands a directory and shows children on tap

testcase.classname: FileExplorer — expand/collapse changes directory icon from ▸ to ▾ when expanded
testcase.name: FileExplorer — expand/collapse changes directory icon from ▸ to ▾ when expanded

testcase.classname: FileExplorer — expand/collapse collapses a directory and hides children on second tap
testcase.name: FileExplorer — expand/collapse collapses a directory and hides children on second tap

testcase.classname: FileExplorer — expand/collapse restores ▸ icon after collapse
testcase.name: FileExplorer — expand/collapse restores ▸ icon after collapse

testcase.classname: FileExplorer — deletion calls onFileDelete with path on long-press
testcase.name: FileExplorer — deletion calls onFileDelete with path on long-press

testcase.classname: FileExplorer — deletion does not crash if onFileDelete is not provided
testcase.name: FileExplorer — deletion does not crash if onFileDelete is not provided

testcase.classname: FileExplorer — error handling does not crash when listDirectory rejects
testcase.name: FileExplorer — error handling does not crash when listDirectory rejects
